mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`loan` (user_id, product_id, linked_account_id, principal_amount, outstanding_amount, interest_rate, payment_day, info, status, overdue_amount, maturity_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{loan.userId}, #{loan.productId}, #{loan.linkedAccountId}, #{loan.principalAmount}, #{loan.outstandingAmount}, #{loan.interestRate}, #{loan.paymentDay}, #{loan.info}, 'ACTIVE', 0, #{loan.maturityDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT loan_id AS loanId, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, principal_amount AS principalAmount, outstanding_amount AS outstandingAmount, interest_rate AS interestRate, payment_day AS paymentDay, info, status, overdue_date AS overdueDate, overdue_amount AS overdueAmount, maturity_date AS maturityDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM `bank`.`loan` WHERE loan_id = #{loanId}

SELECT `t1`.loan_id AS loanId, `t1`.user_id AS userId, `t1`.product_id AS productId, `t1`.linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, `t1`.principal_amount AS principalAmount, `t1`.outstanding_amount AS outstandingAmount, `t1`.interest_rate AS interestRate, `t1`.payment_day AS paymentDay, `t1`.info, `t1`.status, `t1`.overdue_date AS overdueDate, `t1`.overdue_amount AS overdueAmount, `t1`.maturity_date AS maturityDate, `t1`.created_at AS createdAt, `t1`.updated_at AS updatedAt, `t2`.product_name AS productName, `t2`.`description` AS description FROM `bank`.`loan` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`financial_product` AS `t2` on t1.product_id = t2.product_id WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY loan_id DESC

SELECT loan_id AS loanId, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, principal_amount AS principalAmount, outstanding_amount AS outstandingAmount, interest_rate AS interestRate, payment_day AS paymentDay, info, status, overdue_date AS overdueDate, overdue_amount AS overdueAmount, maturity_date AS maturityDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM `bank`.`loan` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'OVERDUE')

SELECT loan_id AS loanId, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, principal_amount AS principalAmount, outstanding_amount AS outstandingAmount, interest_rate AS interestRate, payment_day AS paymentDay, info, status, overdue_date AS overdueDate, overdue_amount AS overdueAmount, maturity_date AS maturityDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM `bank`.`loan` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'BANKRUPTCY'
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`loan` SET outstanding_amount = #{outstandingAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE loan_id = #{loanId}
UPDATE `bank`.`loan` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE loan_id = #{loanId}
UPDATE `bank`.`loan` SET outstanding_amount = #{loan.outstandingAmount}, status = #{loan.status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE loan_id = #{loan.loanId}

UPDATE `bank`.`loan`
interest_rate = #{loan.interestRate},
payment_day = #{loan.paymentDay},
info = #{loan.info},
status = #{loan.status},
overdue_date = #{loan.overdueDate},
overdue_amount = #{loan.overdueAmount},
maturity_date = #{loan.maturityDate},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE loan_id = #{loan.loanId}
mapper.select: SELECT loan_id AS loanId, overdue_amount AS overdueAmount, overdue_date AS overdueDate, info FROM `bank`.`loan` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (status = 'OVERDUE' OR overdue_amount > 0)

SELECT `t1`.loan_id AS loanId, `t1`.user_id AS userId, `t1`.product_id AS productId, `t1`.linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, `t1`.principal_amount AS principalAmount, `t1`.outstanding_amount AS outstandingAmount, `t1`.interest_rate AS interestRate, `t1`.payment_day AS paymentDay, `t1`.info, `t1`.status, `t1`.overdue_date AS overdueDate, `t1`.overdue_amount AS overdueAmount, `t1`.maturity_date AS maturityDate, `t1`.created_at AS createdAt, `t1`.updated_at AS updatedAt, `t2`.product_name AS productName, `t2`.`description` AS description FROM `bank`.`loan` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`financial_product` AS `t2` on t1.product_id = t2.product_id WHERE loan_id = #{loanId}
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`loan` SET overdue_amount = overdue_amount + #{amount}, status = 'OVERDUE' WHERE loan_id = #{loanId}
